title: Which Is the Better Dividend Stock: Viatris or Apple?
text: Viatris isn't growing quickly, but its dividend yield is high at the moment. Apple is growing steadily, and it has a long history of paying out to shareholders.

title: Why Is Viatris (VTRS) Down 16.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Viatris (VTRS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Don't Be Fooled by These 3 Value Traps
text: In stock investing, these are called value traps. Value traps are equities that appear to be inexpensive because they have low valuations.

title: Viatris: The Value And The Value Trap
text: To say Viatris has been a sore disappointment since its spin-off, would be a massive understatement. The company came into its listing on very low valuations and had to do very little right to deliver average returns.

title: 3 Healthcare Spinoffs Worth a Look, But 1 Has the Best Long-Term Potential
text: Embecta should benefit from the greater need for diabetic services. Viatris is focusing on finding new generics.

title: Is Viatris' 5% Dividend Yield Safe?
text: Viatris has been paying down debt, but investors remain wary of investing in the company. Interest costs, however, haven't been crippling the business.

title: Better Generics Pharmaceutical Stock: Teva or Viatris?
text: Teva is the world's largest maker of generic drugs. Viatris offers an above-average dividend yield.

title: Viatris: Too Cheap To Ignore
text: Viatris recently closed out 2022 having largely met management's prior guidance. It's aggressively paying down debt and recent acquisitions may drive meaningful growth down the road.
